description: Complete the Mesh coordination layer per VELQUA_MESH_BRIEF.md. All four modules must be built and tested. The Mesh tab must appear in the UI. The proxy must detect agent identity and inject shared memory.
initial_prompt:
# Task: Ship Velqua Mesh v1.0

Read VELQUA_MESH_BRIEF.md in this directory. Build everything described in it.

The following files already exist and are partially built:
- backend/mesh/__init__.py
- backend/mesh/db.py
- backend/mesh/registry.py
- backend/mesh/shared_memory.py
- backend/mesh/noteboard.py

What still needs to be done:
1. Complete any stub methods in the mesh modules (check for pass, NotImplementedError, TODOs)
2. Create backend/routes/mesh.py with all endpoints from the brief
3. Register mesh routes in backend/server.py
4. Extend backend/proxy.py to detect agent identity via registry and inject shared memory
5. Add Mesh tab to src/index.html and src/app.js
6. Write tests/test_mesh.py covering registry, shared memory, noteboard, and routes
7. Add ## Mesh section to README.md describing the feature

Constraints:
- All 569 existing tests must still pass
- Do not break the existing proxy, memory, or provider systems
- Use the existing SQLite patterns from backend/anamnesis/
- MIT license, Python 3.10+

When all criteria pass, say: DONE
